entry.title: R Coding Reference
entry.content: Here I uploaded some pages for reference when you are coding in R language.These notes are copied from R programming lectures. I am also generally modifying them to make the notes more helpful. Lecture 1: R IntroductionLecture 2: Factors and MatricesLecture 3: Lists and Data FramesLecture 4: Data Frames and Control StatementLecture 5: Manipulate data frames with dplyrLecture 6: tidyr and readr packageLecture 7: Graphics I: base graphicsLecture 8: Intro to R - Plots Part II - ggplot2

entry.title: Welcome to my blog
entry.content: This is Sijianf, and I am happy to meet you here. Studying in Emory now, I would like to share my opinions to people and also get your views about this world. I am not a typical coder, most of my work will be linked to SAS, R, or Python. It doesn’t matter, though. Still, Hi, everyone!
